name: Editable values card sort
description: A generic, non-proprietary starter set designed for editing and expansion.
licenseNote: Original CC0-style starter vocabulary; edit freely.

values.name: Authenticity
values.definition: Living in alignment with what one sincerely believes.

values.name: Belonging
values.definition: Feeling accepted and connected to a group.

values.name: Care
values.definition: Attending to others' needs and flourishing.

values.name: Curiosity
values.definition: Seeking new understanding and experience.

values.name: Fairness
values.definition: Treating people impartially and justly.

values.name: Freedom
values.definition: Having meaningful choice over one's actions.

values.name: Growth
values.definition: Developing capacity, understanding, and maturity.

values.name: Honesty
values.definition: Representing reality and one's intentions truthfully.

values.name: Joy
values.definition: Making room for delight and aliveness.

values.name: Mastery
values.definition: Building excellent skill through sustained practice.

values.name: Meaning
values.definition: Contributing to purposes experienced as significant.

values.name: Peace
values.definition: Reducing destructive conflict within and around oneself.

values.name: Responsibility
values.definition: Owning commitments and consequences.

values.name: Security
values.definition: Maintaining safety and dependable foundations.

values.name: Service
values.definition: Using one's effort for others or a larger cause.

values.name: Stewardship
values.definition: Caring responsibly for shared resources and future needs.

values.name: Tradition
values.definition: Sustaining inherited practices that carry meaning.

values.name: Trust
values.definition: Relying on and being reliable to others.

values.name: Wonder
values.definition: Remaining receptive to awe and mystery.

values.name: Stability
values.definition: Preserving continuity and predictability over time.
